verdict: REFUTED — shape=panel_summary, sign + OPPOSITE claim -; |Δ_log|=0.38, ratio=1.46; threshold 50.0%, observed 38.0%
verdict_reason: shape=panel_summary, sign + OPPOSITE claim -; |Δ_log|=0.38, ratio=1.46; threshold 50.0%, observed 38.0%
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED iff BOTH (a) pooled OECD territorial CO2/cap 2023 / 2010 < 1.0 AND pooled OECD real GDP/cap 2023 / 2010 > 1.05 (absolute decoupling fact), AND (b) mean pace_gap_vs_15c across OECD-35 in 2023 > 0.05 (>= 5 percentage points above the 1.5C benchmark; pace insufficient). REFUTED if (a) fails (no decoupling) OR (b) fails by more than 5 pp (i.e. pace_gap < -0.05; pace actually faster than benchmark). PARTIAL if exactly one leg holds. INFORMATIVE: country-level dispersion, consumption-based cross- check, sub-period decomposition. METHOD_VALID: at least 28 of 35 OECD countries have both endpoints on territorial CO2pc and real GDPpc; OWID consumption-CO2 panel covers >= 25 OECD countries.

variables_missing.name: post_paris_indicator
variables_missing.source: constructed: 1 for years >= 2016 (Paris Agreement entry into force)
